phase-plan.purpose: Turn the Payload website template into a real exterior-cleaning marketing site with seeded pages, proof, clear conversion paths, and customer-facing trust/support content.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: homepage and core service pages, seed baseline content, layout-builder usage, customer-facing support/legal pages, review/testimonial content planning, before/after proof, CTA flow, and launch content QA. Out of scope: deep CRM automation, quote economics, and editable internal scorecard data.

file.description: Seed ownership and repeatable content reset path.
Public-site routes, forms, and launch content checklist.
Baseline homepage content and layout blocks.
Seed entrypoint and idempotent content upsert.
Seeded customer-facing privacy, terms, refund, and contact SLA pages.

task.description: Seed and publish the real homepage and core marketing pages, including founder-story/about content, instead of relying on the static fallback.
Establish a quick-edit path for reviews, testimonials, and before/after proof inside Payload admin.

Verify nav, CTAs, service areas, form submission, customer trust/support pages, visual-system/theme polish, masked section framing, compact code-viewer style service explainers with side-by-side detail panes, and mobile launch quality after seed content is in place.
Publish customer-facing support/legal pages in Payload for privacy, terms, refund handling, and contact response standards.

questions.question: Should testimonials be a dedicated collection, a reusable block, or a global for fastest admin editing?
Will pricing stay estimate-only messaging or include starting-price ranges on the public site?
